snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and Harry‚Äôs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines won‚Äôt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

Subscribe to The National: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/CBCTheNational?sub_confirmation=1

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

Tozla instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/tozla

Neven IN VIVO instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/neven_invivo

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Sa tobom sve je rulet, od milke do nule,
Brze nego Tesla S, ej
Tako ti je sa princezama, voli kad je vezana,
Pssst, Samo niko da ne cuje.

Ele ele ele ele
Ko bi reko da je mala ziva vatra.
Ele ele
Njene misli koje skriva nocu gresnije od pakla.

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Mala moze casove da daje,
Kada igra opasna je,
I svi kazu aj jaj jaj jaj,

Nocas lepa je ko Raj,
Kukovima uvija,
I svi kazu samo aj jaj jaj

snippet.title: BEZ USTRUńĆAVANJA - BoŇĺo Prelevińá: U toku je obrańćun izmeńĎu Aleksandra Vuńćińáa i NebojŇ°e Stefanovińáa!
snippet.description:
Gost emisije ‚ÄúBez ustruńćavanja‚ÄĚ bio je advokat i nekadaŇ°nji ministar MUP-a, BoŇĺo Prelevińá koji je komentarisao hapŇ°enje kriminalne grupe Veljka Belivuka i ukazao na dogańĎaje prethodinih godina koji su ovu grupu povezivali sa aktuelnom vlaŇ°ńáu. Da li je poreńĎenje ovog klana sa Zemunskim opravdano i zbog ńćega se toliko dugo ńćekalo na njihovo hapŇ°enje, Ň°ta nam govori vreme njihovog liŇ°avanja slobode, zbog ńćega su snimci sa mesta zlońćina procureli u javnost i objavljivani u tabloidima i na televizijama, po reńćima BoŇĺe Prelevińáa, to govori o uniŇ°tavanju i kriminalizovanju institucija. Kako komentariŇ°e ostavke sekretara DrŇĺavnog veńáa tuŇĺilaca Tome Zorińáa, ali i Vladimira Vuletińáa sa mesta potpredsednika FK ‚ÄĚPartzian‚ÄĚ, ali i sasluŇ°anje nekadaŇ°njeg nańćelnika Kriminalistińćke policije Ilije Milańćińáa, saznańáete u emisiji. Prelevińá je komentarisao i izbor Jasmine Vasovińá za predsednicu Vrhovnog Kasacionog suda, ali i Zoru Dobrińćanin za ńćlanicu Visokog saveta sudstva i DrŇĺavnog veńáa tuŇĺilaca i podsetio da je ona branilac okrivljenih u aferi ‚ÄúJovanjica‚ÄĚ. Prelevińá smatra da ńáe zbog kriminalnih klanova reagovati i Evropa, jer prevazilaze okvire naŇ°e zemlje, u emisiji ńáete takońĎe mońái da saznate zbog ńćega smatra da nam je Francuska podrŇ°ka ka Evropskoj Uniji, ali i zbog ńćega je skeptik kada se govori o ubrzanom procesu ka prikljuńćivanju i otvaranju novih klastera. Hońáe li se opozicija ujediniti, Ň°ta ońćekuje od pregovora izmeńĎu vlasti i opozicije, zbog ńćega je pomońá iz Evrope u pregovaranju neophodna i koja je uloga SkupŇ°tine slobodne Srbije, vidi li Ň°ansu opozicije na narednim izborima, samo su neka od pitanja o aktuelnim politińćkim temama na koje je dao odgovor. Gost je ńćestitao predsedniku Srbije Aleksandru Vuńćińáu na vakcinaciji stanovniŇ°tva, ali i izrazio zabrinutost zbog izuzetka empatije kod naŇ°ih grańĎana zbog broja preminulih lekara usled pandemije i sa druge strane, kako kaŇĺe veńá skoro godinu dana neometanog organizovanja kovid zabava.

Drugańćija od drugih, Iva, vodi vas u svet aktuelne svetske i domańáe muzińćke scene. Saznańáete Ň°ta drugi sluŇ°aju, ko je i zbog ńćega na vrhu top lista. Uz to, otkrińáete
zanimljive detalje iz privatnog Ňĺivota izvońĎańća sa top liste.

Koje javne lińćnosti su radile intervencije na licu i telu? Kako su izgledale pre, a kako posle njih i da li one to kriju ili otvoreno o tome prińćaju? Kroz ove zanimljive razgovore vode vas Milica LeŇ°ińá i Ljubomir Dorontińá.

Sa gostima prińćaju o zabavnim sadrŇĺajima, umetnosti i aktuelnim deŇ°avanjima u svetu i kod nas. Uz pomońá benda i kroz zabavne igre zajedno sa gostima se zabavljaju na dinamińćan i upeńćatljiv nańćin.

"Kec na Jedanaest"
Ponovo su tu! Omiljeni voditeljski par, BoŇ°ko Jakovljevińá i Aleksandra Jeftanovińá, vode vas kroz kasni jutarnji Ň°ou, svakog radnog dana od 11 do 13.

snippet.title: Na veńćeri kod: Tijana Dapńćevińá / sezona 2 / ep2
snippet.description:
U sledeńáoj epizodi serijala "Na veńćeri kod" videńáete kako se u ulozi domańáice snaŇ°la prva predstavnica Biber ekipe, Ň°armantna Tijana Dapńćevińá.
Njene srpsko-makedonske specijalitete ocenjivańáe Ana Stanińá, Ivana Peters, Aleksandra Bursańá, Milan Gromilińá, Bojan Vaskovińá i proŇ°lonedeljni domańáin Ivan Mihailovińá.

Saznańáete za koju je pesmu Tijana dobila najveńái bakŇ°iŇ° u Ňĺivotu i to baŇ° od sopstvenog muŇĺa sa kojim je pońćela da Ňĺivi dan-dva nakon upoznavanja. ńĆuńáete kako ona sama sebe zove i Ň°ta o tome misli njena najbolja drugarica i imenjakinja Tijana.
Tijana otkriva da njeno violonńćelo ima ime, ali i zaŇ°to nije postala pijanista ili violinista i zaŇ°to je "privilegija" kada ni jedan jedini dan ne mora da ide na posao.

Njeni gosti pokazali su se kao duhoviti, jeŇ°ni i raspevani, a u tome su posebno prednjańćili Ivana i Bojan koji je svojim saborcima otkrio i Ň°ta znańći "kovrdŇĺavo pevanje", ali je i sama domańáica u viŇ°e navrata potvrdila svoj dobar glas.


Label and copyright: Radio-televizija Srbije
 
Zabranjeno svako kopiranje video i/ili audio snimaka i postavljanje na druge kanale!

snippet.title: Najjednostavnija ńćokoladna torta sa piŇ°kotama - bez kuvanja i peńćenja
snippet.description:
ńĆokoladna torta sa piŇ°kotama je za sve one koji vole mnogo bogatog krema. Iz naslova vidimo da je sa ńćokoladom, kao i da je priprema veoma jednostavna, tako da ńáe se sigurno dopasti svima sa nedostatkom vremena. Tortu sa piŇ°kotama moŇĺete da pravite uz dodavanje nekih svojih omiljenih sastojaka jer je apsolutno podloŇĺna promenama. 

Pisani recept moŇĺete pronańái na https://domacirecepti.net/cokoladna-torta-sa-piskotama-video/

Domańái recepti je kanal na kojem prikazujemo video recepte za torte, kolańće, pogańće, kifle. MoŇĺete nańái predjela kao i glavna jela. Pravimo joŇ° i sitne kolańće, kolańće za slavu, lepinje, posna jela, slavske pogańće.

‚Ė∂ MoŇĺete nas podrŇĺati i na ovaj nańćin: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCziASxiSNISFR_FxJ8vFjnA/join

ūĚźíūĚźöūĚź¨ūĚź≠ūĚź®ūĚź£ūĚźúūĚźĘ:

1 l slatke pavlake
400 g tamne ńćokolade
160 g mleńćne ńćokolade
4 pakovanja piŇ°kota
120 g Ň°laga od ńćokolade

joŇ° mleko za umakanje piŇ°kota

snippet.title: Emanet 131. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 131 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#Shorts

snippet.title: MEDICO - Mamma Mia (prod. by EnelBeatz)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM PROFILI:
Medico : https://www.instagram.com/whoismedico/

Music: Medico
Text: Medico
Arrangement: EnelBeatz
Back vocal: MaŇ°a Sitarica
Mix & Master: Arpino Sachi


Video production: Vedad Mandra | xvedmanx
Directed by: Medico, Vedad Mandra
Script: Vedad Mandra, Medico
Camera: Vedad Mandra
CC VFX Post: Vedad Mandra
Costume: Emina Tsili

TEXT

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrti se sve dharma 
mama mia

ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x2


vers1
moje sve htjele bi bit
 jer na meni samo je lagerfeld karl e 
zelja joj htjela benz
 nije ni bitno ko sjedi sa strane

moli da voli brzo da boli
moli za gole sate
prolij pa dolij 
glumi mi dolly dobro ta zna sta radi

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugi il treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal

takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrati se sve dharma 
mama mia

 ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x3


vers 2.
da li mislis na mene ko prije
prisjetis se probije ko noz
navijas ti za mene i lijek
tvoj sam jedini ja antidot

znas ti moje namjere ne nisu namjerne
ali vuce me na zlo
velike su razmjere izmedju zavjere
razlika je nebo tlo

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugil treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal
takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

snippet.title: Vladika Porfirije pjeva ńćetnińćke pjesme
snippet.description:
Novi patrijarh SPC-a Porfirije, do danas mitropolit zagrebańćko-ljubljanski osvanuo je prije pet godina na video snimku, kako u zanimljivom druŇ°tvu pjeva ńćetnińćku pjesmu posveńáenu ńćetnińćkom vojvodi Momńćilu ńźujińáu, ratnom zlońćincu iz Drugog svjetskog rata.

Snimak je navodno nastao prije pet godina u Chicagu.

- Nakon liturgije bio je ruńćak i zabava, rekao sam Voji Bilbiji da otpjeva "naŇ°u pjesmu", misleńái na "Tamo daleko". On je pońćeo pjevati pjesmu koju i ne znam i nekako sam pjevuŇ°io za njima, malo iznenańĎen Ň°to nije zapjevao onu koju sam mislio, pa sam u jednom trenutku i zaŇ°utio - pravdao se Porfirije u hrvatskim medijima rekavŇ°i da je zaŇ°utio kada se pjevalo o "kokardi vojvode ńźujińáa".

Iz snimke se jasno vidi da je Perińá velik dio pjesme zaista opjevao, a veńá od pońćetka same pjesme jasno je da se radi o pjesmi ratne tematike s obzirom da se spominju "mitraljesci" i "granate".

- Ň†ta se ono na Dinari sjaji, ńźujińáeva kokarda na glavi - kaŇĺe sporni stih, a teŇ°ko je procijeniti je li Porfirije zaista, kako tvrdi, prestao pjevati.

snippet.title: Jokic STEALS The MVP Trophy From Giannis (What You DIDN'T SEE)
snippet.description:
Giannis won the All Star Game MVP by going 16 out of 16 from the field. And later in the postgame interview he celebrated like Lebron James. 
Let me show you a few more interesting moments from the All Star Game that you may have missed. What up everybody my name is Stefan and this is Heat Check. Let‚Äôs get into it.
After winning the 3 point shootout with the last shot, Steph Curry continued his lights out shooting in the actual game as well. And for those of you that missed it, Steph did his signature look away with the ball still in the air. A classic that never gets old.
And on the topic of shooting, of course you saw the wild half court barrage that him and Damian Lillard had. And Dame of course ended the game that way, with a shot from the logo.
The most interesting thing for me here is that Curry already knew what was about to happen as soon as Lillard got the ball. So he started waving goodbye announcing that the game is over.
And of course it was over at that same moment.
So after all those long range shots by Portland‚Äôs superstar, Paul George finally admitted in the postgame interview that the Blazers vs Thunder playoff three, is actually not a bad shot.
You all remember this right? Well here is PG admitting that he was wrong. BTW did you know that this is the first official basketball game that Steph and Lebron have been on the same team? They haven‚Äôt played together in the All Star Game before nor have they been on the same Team USA roster.
So it was great to see moments like these as we got a glimpse of what could have been if these 2 played together on the same roster. This is literally a cheat code.
The mutual respect and appreciation continued after the game on twitter as you can see with Lebron leading the way, and Curry responding.
My favorite thing from the entire  All Star is probably seeing how much fun Nikola Jokic had, and how much he enjoyed being out there.
Like look at him, he is acting crazy after the simplest bucket ever, then check out his reaction on the Giannis three. Hilarious.
And these 2 definitely had great chemistry, as we see Nikola teaching Giannis some dancing moves on the bench.
And at the end, Antetokounmpo borrowed the MVP trophy to Jokic, so that he can feel like he won it. Man this is too funny seeing that big of a dude acting with pure joy like a little kid.
In the postgame he joked about being snubbed from the All Star Game MVP for the second consecutive year. This dude is one of the funniest characters in the league.
To top things off, he wore a mismatch colored sneakers in the game, and for those of you that haven‚Äôt seen his logo, check it out, I think it's a pretty cool design. The Joker hat with the initials and the number. Good job Nike.
Did you see this? Jaylen Brown tried to pass it to himself and dunk it off the backboard.
This was paying homage to Tracy Mcgrady who famously did it first, and Brown even had the same shoes that T-Mac was rocking back then. So it was a shame that he wasn‚Äôt able to finish it properly.
And you all saw these back to back alley oops between Steph and CP3. They almost never dunk in-game, and that is especially true for Chris Paul. So with his first dunk of the season, he surpassed Blake Griffin, who hasn‚Äôt dunked in more than a year. Now that‚Äôs a mind blowing fact in itself. 
Speaking of Blake Griffin however, I know that he wasn‚Äôt in the game itself, but the news about his move to the Brooklyn Nets happened yesterday, so some of you may have missed it.
Yeah, as if they weren‚Äôt stacked enough, now Blake comes in as extra firepower and according to Woj, the Nets plan to utilize him as a small ball center with the second unit.
While talking about Brooklyn, here‚Äôs how his new teammate Kyrie Irving came to the game.
We‚Äôve seen him arriving at games like this a few times already, so this is nothing new but just wanted to mention it as part of the things that you guys may have missed from the All Star.
And at the very end I do like to point out that even tho the dunk contest was a bit disappointing, we did see 1 dunk that we haven‚Äôt seen before.
And that was this slam from Obi Topin which in my opinion received a way lower score than it should have.
People who follow the league closely, probably saw Zach Lavine do this during a pre-game warm up, but technically this hasn‚Äôt been done in a dunk contest. 
And I also wanna comment on the winning dunk by Anfernee Simmons. Even tho the execution wasn‚Äôt the greatest, I love the idea, and this is something that Dwight Howard was practicing before one of his dunk contests a few years ago, but as you can see he also couldn‚Äôt do it although he was close as well, so he ended up not trying it in the actual contest.
So yeah, all in all it was fun to take a break from the grind of the season, and Lebron definitely did that as he played the least minutes out of any player in the game.

And you all saw these back to back alley oops between Steph and CP3. They almost never dunk in-game, and that is especially true for Chris Paul. So with his first dunk of the season, he surpassed Blake Griffin, who hasn‚Äôt dunked in more than a year. Now that‚Äôs a mind blowing fact in itself. 
Speaking of Blake Griffin however, I know that he wasn‚Äôt in the game itself, but the news about his move to the Brooklyn Nets happened yesterday, so some of you may have missed it.
Yeah, as if they weren‚Äôt stacked enough, now Blake comes in as extra firepower and according to Woj, the Nets plan to utilize him as a small ball center with the second unit.
While talking about Brooklyn, here‚Äôs how his new teammate Kyrie Irving came to the game.
We‚Äôve seen him arriving at games like this a few times already, so this is nothing new but just wanted to mention it as part of the things that you guys may have missed from the All Star.
And at the very end I do like to point out that even tho the dunk contest was a bit disappointing, we did see 1 dunk that we haven‚Äôt seen before.
And that was this slam from Obi Topin which in my opinion received a way lower score than it should have.
People who follow the league closely, probably saw Zach Lavine do this during a pre-game warm up, but technically this hasn‚Äôt been done in a dunk contest. 
And I also wanna comment on the winning dunk by Anfernee Simmons. Even tho the execution wasn‚Äôt the greatest, I love the idea, and this is something that Dwight Howard was practicing before one of his dunk contests a few years ago, but as you can see he also couldn‚Äôt do it although he was close as well, so he ended up not trying it in the actual contest.
So yeah, all in all it was fun to take a break from the grind of the season, and Lebron definitely did that as he played the least minutes out of any player in the game.

snippet.title: TSC - Crvena zvezda 1:3, highlights
snippet.description:
TSC - Crvena zvezda 1:3 (0:0)

Stadion: Gradski stadion u Senti.

Sudija: Novak Simovińá.

Strelci: Lukińá u 58. minutu (iz jedanaesterca) za TSC, Pavkov u 54. i 71. i Kanga u 68. minutu (iz jedanaesterca) za Crvenu zvezdu.

ŇĹuti kartoni: Damjanovińá, Zec, ńźakovac, Tomanovińá, Filipovińá (TSC)

Crveni kartoni: Tomanovińá (TSC), Gajińá ( Crvena zvezda).

TSC: Filipovińá, Petkovińá, Damjanovińá, Babińá, Petrovińá, Stanojev(od 76. Tumbasevińá), Tomanovińá, Banjac(od 84. Ratkov), Zec, Lukińá(od 84. Milińáevińá), ńźakovac(od 76. TomaŇ°evińá).

Rezerve: Jorgińá, BalaŇĺ, Varga, TomaŇ°evińá, Krsmanovińá, Milińáevińá, Tumbasovińá, Santrańć, Duronjińá, Ratkov, Dostanińá.

Crvena zvezda: Borjan, Gajińá, Milunovińá, Degenek, Rodińá(od 77. Gobeljińá), Sanogo, Petrovińá(od 46. Srnińá), Nikolińá(od 46. Kanga), Ivanińá(od 77. Pankov), Katai(od 46. Pavkov), Ben.

snippet.title: Emanet 132. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 132 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Oprah With Meghan And Harry First Look | "Almost Unsurvivable"
snippet.description:

Aleksandar ńźorńĎevińá iz BIRN izjavio je u Danu uŇĺivo da "poslednjih dana svedońćimo tome da se pravi pritisak na NebojŇ°u Stefanovińáa". "Sve je viŇ°e jasno da je on prava meta svih ovih tabloidnih proganjanja i politińćka meta Vuńćińáa. Nama ostaje glavno pitanje zaŇ°to je NebojŇ°a Stefanovińá baŇ° sada i u ovom trenutku stavljen na odstrel i zaŇ°to se u stvari zamerio Vuńćińáu. Svi u reŇĺimu su svesni da bi takav potez bio pońćetak kraja ovog reŇĺima, obrańćunavanje sa Stefanovińáem ne moŇĺe da prońĎe bezbolno u ovom trenutku", kaŇĺe.

He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. snippet.title: Perseverance Rover‚Äôs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Watch NASA‚Äôs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover ‚Äď the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space ‚Äď search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA‚Äôs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) ‚Äď our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceX‚Äôs site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ‚Äď approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship‚Äôs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10‚Äôs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX‚Äôs third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. snippet.title: KONAńĆNI OBRAńĆUN SA REPTILIMA: Mi smo deo velikog sukoba, Ň°titi nas mońána galaktińćka federacija!
snippet.description:
Gost na YouTube kanalu "Nauka i Misterije Balkan" bio je Aleksandar Hengl, osnivańć druŇ°tva prijatelja "Povratak Izvoru". On je medijum, astralni putnik i komunikacioni kanal za vanzemaljske civilizacije galaktińćke federacije, u misiji za podizanje svesti usnulog ńćoveńćanstva i njegovu integraciju u galaktińćke tokove i Univerzumske Unifikacije. Kao osnivańć duhovnog centra ‚ÄúPovratak Izvoru‚ÄĚ u Novom Sadu, organizuje edukativne skupove "Susret nauke i duhovnosti". TakońĎe je i saradnik serijala emisija ‚ÄúKosmos‚ÄĚ. Preporuńćujemo Vam da pogledate celu emisiju i saznate viŇ°e o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar Pavkovińá.

*************************************************************

Zabranjeno je svako preuzimanje snimaka i objavljivanje na drugim YouTube kanalima. Svi duplikati ńáe biti uklanjani u skladu sa YouTube pravilima. Iz ovoga ńáe biti izuzeti samo oni koji dobiju specijalnu dozvolu od vlasnika autorskih prava.

Autorska prava: "BALKAN INFO - Zvanińćni kanal"
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLG5Qu54Q7gywaCeDs5etuQ

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i Ňĺele da pomognu rad naŇ°e produkcije to mogu uńćiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. Trudińáemo se da ostanemo dosledni naŇ°oj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i Ň°irenju istine bez cenzure.

BALKAN INFO je nezavisna medijska produkcija osnovana u junu 2015. godine u Beogradu. Prepoznati smo kao glas svih koji ne Ňĺele da budu deo kratkotrajnih projekata i saveza, svih onih koji poŇ°tuju srpske tradicionalne vrednosti i koji ńćuvaju seńáanje na naŇ°e slavne pretke.

snippet.title: See Mars Like Never Before! NASA's Perseverance Rover Sends New Video and Images of the Red Planet
snippet.description: NASA‚Äôs Perseverance Mars Rover safely touched down on the Red Planet on Feb. 18. So what will the robotic scientist "see" on her descent and what will she do next? Join mission experts for update about the rover ‚Äď the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space ‚Äď including imagery it captured and its mission to explore Mars.

snippet.title: Game Recap: Nuggets 128, Bucks 97
snippet.description: Nikola Jokic recorded the 50th triple-double of his career as he tallied 37 points, 10 rebounds and 11 assists for the Nuggets as they defeated the Bucks, 128-97. Giannis Antetokounmpo recorded 27 points, eight rebounds and three assists for the Bucks in the losing effort. The Nuggets improve to 20-15 on the season, while the Bucks fall to 21-14.

snippet.title: The Nuggets might need to give up Jamal Murray to keep Nikola Jokic happy - Paul Pierce | The Jump
snippet.description:
Paul Pierce and Richard Jefferson join Rachel Nichols on The Jump to play "Panic or Patience?" for the Miami Heat, Toronto Raptors and the Denver Nuggets. 
0:00 Panic or Patience? for the Miami Heat
2:05 Jefferson says the Toronto Raptors need to give up assets moving forward.
4:32 Pierce says the Denver Nuggets should panic.
4:53 Pierce believes the Nuggets might need to give up Jamal Murray to get back into the top 4 in the Western conference and keep Nikola Jokic happy.
